topic: Sweden 5-1 Tunisia — World Cup 2026 Group F opener; Yasin Ayari brace steals the show from Isak & Gyökeres
subject: yasin-ayari

hook.spoken_hook: Everyone came for Sweden's superstar strikers. A twenty-two-year-old stole the show.

scenes.voiceover: Everyone came for Sweden's superstar strikers. A twenty-two-year-old stole the show.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black background, gold gradient energy streaks (#F7D774 to #C8881B), bold white condensed type, a faceless blue-and-yellow Sweden kit silhouette emerging from shadow, premium broadcast feel, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Seven minutes in, Yasin Ayari curled a worldie into the top corner.

scenes.voiceover: Then Isak raced clear to make it two.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black-and-gold, a streaking forward silhouette breaking the defensive line, motion blur, bold white type, no faces, vertical 9:16 premium broadcast.

scenes.voiceover: Tunisia pulled one back — Gyökeres answered instantly.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background with gold burst, a powerful faceless striker silhouette wheeling away in celebration, bold white type, broadcast-grade, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Svanberg made four, then Ayari sealed his brace in stoppage time.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Explosive gold confetti over deep black, a faceless Sweden silhouette arms-wide, bold white type reading the rout, vertical 9:16 broadcast finish.

scenes.voiceover: Sweden top Group F. Follow for a World Cup story every single day.

comment_bait: Sweden look frightening — but the Netherlands are next. Dark horses, or flat-track bullies? Tell me where they finish in Group F.

thumbnail.concept: Split frame — Isak and Gyökeres faded into shadow on one side, a young Sweden No. in bright gold light on the other, big '5-1' and 'AYARI x2' tag, curiosity-driven, no broadcast imagery.

youtube_title: Sweden 5-1 Tunisia: Ayari's Brace Steals the Show from Isak & Gyökeres | World Cup 2026
youtube_description: Sweden opened their 2026 World Cup with a 5-1 rout of Tunisia in Group F — and it wasn't the superstar strikers who stole it. Yasin Ayari bagged a brace, with Isak, Gyökeres and Svanberg also on the scoresheet. Sweden top the group. Where do they finish? Subscribe for a World Cup story every single day. #WorldCup2026 #Sweden
